register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Get started with PAPERY
register.termsNotice: By creating an account, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

verification.title: Check your email
verification.subtitle: We sent a verification link to {email}
verification.body: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: We sent a password reset link to {email}

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below
resetPassword.successMessage: You can now sign in with your new password

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and number.
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists
errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before signing in
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Unable to connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
errors.tokenExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.resetLinkExpired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to access this resource.
errors.nameTooShort: Name must be between 2 and 50 characters.
